title: [Spontaneous hosts of broad bean wilt virus. Communication].
abstract: Of 110 plant species, grown from seeds in the vicinity of sources of broad bean wilt virus (BBWV) in 1974, exactly 50% proved to be infected by the mentioned virus within one vegetation period. Obviously 54 of the species are previously unknown hosts of BBWV. They belong to the following 21 families: Amaranthaceae, Boraginaceae, Campanulaceae, Caryophyllaceae, Chenopodiaceae, Commelinaceae, Compositae, Cruciferae, Euphorbiaceae, Hydrophyllaceae, Labiatae, Leguminosae, Loasaceae, Papaveraceae, Polemoniaceae, Portulacaceae, Ranunculaceae, Resedaceae, Scrophulariaceae, Solanaceae, and Umbelliferae. Within 6 families, marked by, no spontaneous hosts of BBWV were ascertained before. Only a few of the plant species found to be infected did not show disease symptoms. However, a considerable part of the BBWV hosts were additionally infected by cucumber mosaic virus. BBWV seems to possess a natural host range not very much less than alfalfa mosaic virus. Among monocotyls BBWV seems to have even a larger host range than alfalaf mosaic virus has.
journal: Zentralblatt fur Bakteriologie, Parasitenkunde, Infektionskrankheiten und Hygiene. Zweite naturwissenschaftliche Abt.: Allgemeine, landwirtschaftliche und technische Mikrobiologie
symptoms: 多数被感染植物表现症状，少数无症状
host_plant: 54种新宿主植物，分属21科（包括苋科、紫草科、桔梗科、石竹科、藜科、鸭跖草科、菊科、十字花科、大戟科、田基麻科、唇形科、豆科、刺莲科、罂粟科、花荵科、马齿苋科、毛茛科、木犀草科、玄参科、茄科、伞形科）
overview: 将110种植物种植于BBWV毒源附近，经一个生长季节后检测感染情况，发现50%被感染，其中54种为新自然宿主，部分同时感染黄瓜花叶病毒。
methods: 田间种植观察及病毒检测
results: 110种植物中55种被感染，54种为新宿主，分属21科；少数无症状，部分同时感染CMV；BBWV自然宿主范围接近苜蓿花叶病毒，在单子叶植物中范围更广。
discussion: BBWV自然宿主范围较广，在单子叶植物中甚至大于苜蓿花叶病毒，暗示其适应性强。

title: Further studies on the biology of an antiviral factor (AVF) from virus-infected plants and its association with the N-gene of Nicotiana species.
abstract: The antiviral factor (AVF) from virus-infected plants, purified on polyacrylamide gels, could be labelled with radioactive phosphorus and its activity could be eluted from the gels. The radioactivity and the antiviral activity were co-purified and thus co-electrophoresed; hence, the previously reported radioactive zone (Antignus, Sela & Harpaz, 1975) can be regarded as AVF. The production of AVF requires both the presence of the N-gene in the plant as well as virus infection. AVF production is inhibited by actinomycin D, but its activity is not affected by this drug. AVF production is correlated in time with the development of virus resistance in a local-lesion host. AVF inhibits TMV multiplication in infected leaves and suppresses virus synthesis almost totally in a local-lesion host. Some AVF is also produced when Nicotiana glutinosa L. is infected with a non-localized virus, but to a much lesser extent and at a later stage of infection. The production of AVF in N. glutinosa is not blocked at 30 degrees C. even though TMV is no longer localized at this temperature.
authors: Antignus Y; Sela I; Harpaz I
overview: 研究了来自病毒感染植物的抗病毒因子AVF的生物学特性，证实AVF与N-gene相关，能抑制TMV复制，并在局部坏死宿主中与抗性发展同步
methods: 聚丙烯酰胺凝胶纯化、放射性磷标记、放线菌素D处理、病毒接种与抗性测定

title: A method for the purification of large quantities of biologically active ribonucleic acid components from cowpea chlorotic mottle virus, a multicomponent plant virus.
abstract: Cowpea chlorotic mottle virus RNA has been prepared in comparatively high yield (at least 50%) by a modified phenol extraction method. The preparation, which has high biological activity, has been resolved into four components by zonal centrifugation on a 15-40% (w/v) sucrose density gradient. The components obtained have been tested for biological activity against whole plants and plant protoplasts. Each of the two largest components RNA 1 and RNA 2 was by itself infective (50-90% of the specific infectivity of the whole genome) and produced virus-specific proteins (coat protein and P2) and RNAs ("RNA 3" and "RNA 4"). Contamination by small proportions (less than 10%) of neighbouring RNAs is presumed to be involved in this infectivity. The two smallest components were obtained in an almost pure form.
journal: Zeitschrift fur Naturforschung. Section C, Biosciences
authors: Trim A R; Dawson J R; Dickerson P E; Sakai F; Watts J W
virus_name: 豇豆褪绿斑驳病毒（Cowpea chlorotic mottle virus, CCMV）
overview: 开发了一种从豇豆褪绿斑驳病毒中纯化大量生物活性RNA的方法，通过蔗糖密度梯度离心分离四个RNA组分，并测试其感染性
methods: 改良苯酚提取法、蔗糖密度梯度离心、整株植物和原生质体感染性测试

title: Single-stranded DNA genome in a whitefly-transmitted plant virus.
abstract: Bean golden yellow mosaic virus (GYMV) DNA sedimented in sucrose density gradients and in an analytical ultracentrifuge as a single component. Values of s(20,w) which depended upon ionic strength (i) and pH, were 16.0 (pH = 7.0, i = 0.1); 16.3 (pH = 7.0, i = 1.0); 9.0 (pH = 13, i = 0.1); and 12.0 (0.1 N NaOH, i = 1.0). GYMV-DNA banded in CsCl as a single component with a buoyant density of 1.7170 g/ml and exhibited hyperchromicity when heated between 20 and 70 degrees . Hyperchromicity and a shift in the ultraviolet light absorption maximum were observed when the DNA was treated with formaldehyde (1.8%) at room temperature. Nuclease sensitivity tests showed that the DNA was susceptible to hydrolysis by DNase I and nuclease S1 (specific for single-stranded DNA) but not to hydrolysis by RNase A or by 0.3 N NaOH. Molecular weight values calculated from sedimentation velocity and CsCl equilibrium data were in the range of 0.66 to 0.95 x 10(6) daltons GYMV thus contains DNA with the properties of a predominantly single-stranded molecule and represents the first reported single-stranded DNA virus from plants.
overview: 本研究通过沉降速度、CsCl密度梯度、核酸酶敏感性等方法，首次证明GYMV基因组为单链DNA，是首个报道的植物单链DNA病毒。
methods: 沉降速度分析、分析超速离心、CsCl平衡密度梯度离心、核酸酶敏感性试验、甲醛处理
